channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: À peine sortie, le nouvel écran incurvé gaming de Xiaomi (34″, 180 Hz) est déjà en promo
item.description: Le Xiaomi G34WQi est un écran incurvé de 34 pouces vendu pour moins de 300 euros. Il conviendra aux gamers compétitifs grâce à sa fréquence de 180 Hz et à son temps de réponse de 1 ms.

item.title: Hausse des prix des iPhone : cette fois, la mémoire n’est pas coupable
item.description: Jusqu'à 11 % de hausse du jour au lendemain : les iPhone flambent au Japon sans explication officielle. Côté français, la vraie menace ne vient pas de là où vous croyez.

item.title: The Laifen T1 Pro is an electric shaver with an Apple-esque aesthetic that isn't backed up by its performance
item.description: The T1 Pro looks great, but it struggled to deliver a clean shave and often snagged painfully.

item.title: X and music publishers quietly settle opposing lawsuits
item.description: The original lawsuit was filed in 2023 and claimed Twitter hosted thousands of cases of copyright infringement.

item.title: Google is open-sourcing its 3D emoji
item.description: Now, if you want to, you can use Google's 3D emoji in your own creations. The company shared some details about how it went about designing the little pictograms and why, as part of World Emoji Day on Friday. Things you might not necessarily worry about in a 2D illustration suddenly become very important when […]

item.title: All the EVs that were discontinued or killed off in the U.S. this year
item.description: Th Honda Prologue will no longer be sold in the U.S., joining a growing list of EV models to exit the market this year.

item.title: How to watch Argentina vs England for FREE: Live Streams & TV Channels for Nations Championship 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Argentina vs England live streams – including for FREE – for the Nations Championship 2026 Round 3 game in Santiago del Estero.

item.title: J’ai testé le Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro, il ne lui manque pas grand chose pour devenir une référence
item.description: Le Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro est un nouveau bracelet connecté commercialisé depuis fin mai. Nous l'avons porté au poignet durant deux semaines afin de vous livrer nos impressions.
